hooks.command: cd "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host codex --hook-event SessionStart --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"

cd "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host codex --hook-event UserPromptSubmit --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"

cd "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host codex --hook-event Stop --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"
